operational_scenes.scene_title: Shutdown Locations and Bag Out Process
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain shutdown locations and bag out procedure for AGVs and totes
operational_intents: Describe shutdown locations for AGVs with and without totes
Explain behavior of AGVs during shutdown state
Detail bag out process and its purpose
Clarify sequence of AGV movements during bag out
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by shutdown and bag out operational details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational topic on shutdown and bag out procedures

operational_scenes.scene_title: Sort Cycle Transitions and Volume Handling
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss sort cycle transitions and volume management in UPS
operational_intents: Explain typical sort cycles in a day
Describe volume impact on sort transitions
Clarify when shutdown and back out occur in high volume settings
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment focused on sort cycle timing and volume effects
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Shift from shutdown to sort cycle and volume discussion

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Zone Operations and Backfill Algorithm
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain AGV zone assignments and backfill algorithm
operational_intents: Describe zone-based AGV pick up and drop off
Explain backfill algorithm and FIFO logic
Detail tipper queues and AGV movements
Introduce hospital role for AGV rejects
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by AGV zone and algorithm operational details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on AGV zone behavior and backfill process

operational_scenes.scene_title: Hospital Role and AGV Handling in Shutdown
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe hospital function and AGV handling during shutdown
operational_intents: Explain hospital as reject station for AGVs
Detail AGV entrance, tote drop off, and charging behavior
Clarify shutdown queue purpose and AGV cycling
Discuss tipper issues and package handling in rejects
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment focused on hospital and shutdown AGV operations
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational process on hospital and shutdown handling

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain sorter operational states and transitions
operational_intents: Define shutdown, running, bag out, and close out states
Describe AGV behavior in each state
Discuss planning for peak and non-peak operations
